message:
fix(security): harden SSRF policy, divergence gate auth, and audience token delegation

Add parse_ipv4_lax() to ssrf_policy.rs to detect obfuscated IP formats
including octal (0177.0.0.1), hex (0x7f000001), and collapsed dotted
notation that bypass strict parsing, with audit events for invalid formats.
Add constant_time_eq for hash comparison in divergence_gate.rs and require
HMAC signature on OperatorAuthorization to prevent timing attacks and
forgery. Fix delegation depth enforcement in audience_token.rs so parent
tokens with max_delegation_depth==0 cannot be delegated and child tokens
must have strictly less depth than parent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
